introSection: Woodstock Express is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It was built by Vekoma and opened on May 10, 1999.
fullText:
Woodstock Express is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It was built by Vekoma and opened on May 10, 1999.



Green track and brown supports.
